final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing editorial photo of a minimalist Nordic living room interior.

Style/medium: photorealistic interior photography, Scandinavian minimalism, clean lines, soft natural aesthetic
Composition: wide-angle establishing shot, eye-level perspective, balanced framing with sofa as anchor point
Subject: grey fabric sofa with simple silhouette, potted green plant, floor lamp with slender profile
Scene/backdrop: white painted walls, light oak flooring, large window with soft daylight streaming in
Lighting/mood: soft diffused natural sunlight from large window, bright and airy atmosphere, warm and cozy feeling
Color palette: white walls as dominant base, light oak wood as secondary tone, grey sofa as neutral anchor, green plant as organic accent
Materials/textures: matte painted wall surface, natural wood grain flooring, woven fabric sofa texture, glossy plant leaves
Avoid: cluttered objects, dark shadows, artificial lighting dominance, ornate decorations, 8K stuffer aesthetic
